title: For My Own Tombstone
content:
To me 'twas given to die; to thee 'tis given
To live: alas! one moment sets us even.
Mark! how impartial is the will of Heaven!
meaning:
Matthew Prior's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "For My Own Tombstone"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
